languages.text: {n}Судьба стражей, патрулировавших коридоры комплекса, оказалась незавидной: чудовище оставило от них лишь мешанину из крови, плоти и осколков костей. Одного из стражей оно утащило с собой, и, ступая по кровавому следу, другие бойцы все же смогли вычислить ее логово.{/n}

{n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex's corridors proved grim indeed: the creature left them little more than a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away and, by following the blood trail, the other soldiers were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Судьба стражей, патрулировавших коридоры комплекса, оказалась незавидной: чудовище оставило от них лишь мешанину из крови, плоти и осколков костей. Одного из стражей оно утащило с собой, и, ступая по кровавому следу, другие бойцы все же смогли вычислить ее логово.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex corridors proved grim indeed. The creature left of them nothing but a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away with it, and following the blood trail, the other fighters were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}

{n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex corridors proved grim indeed. The creature left of them nothing but a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away with it, and following the blood trail, the other fighters were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}

{n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex's corridors proved grim indeed: the creature left them little more than a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away and, by following the blood trail, the other soldiers were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}

{n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex's corridors proved grim indeed: the creature left them little more than a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away and, by following the blood trail, the other soldiers were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Patrouillen in den Korridoren des Komplexes erwartete in der Tat ein düsteres Schicksal, da die Kreatur nur eine formlose Masse aus Fleisch und Blut von ihnen übrig ließ. Allerdings schleppte sie eine der Wachen fort, wodurch die anderen Soldaten ihr bis in ihr Versteck folgen konnten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex's corridors proved grim indeed: the creature left them little more than a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away and, by following the blood trail, the other soldiers were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Patrouillen in den Korridoren des Komplexes erwartete in der Tat ein düsteres Schicksal, da die Kreatur nur eine formlose Masse aus Fleisch und Blut von ihnen übrig ließ. Allerdings schleppte sie eine der Wachen fort, wodurch die anderen Soldaten ihr bis in ihr Versteck folgen konnten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le destin des gardes patrouillant les couloirs du complexe s'avéra des plus funestes, la créature ne laissant d'eux qu'une pulpe de sang, chair et os broyés. Elle avait traîné l'un des pauvres hères pour s'en repaître plus tard, et en suivant cette trace sanglante, les autres soldats parvinrent à localiser son antre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex's corridors proved grim indeed: the creature left them little more than a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away and, by following the blood trail, the other soldiers were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le destin des gardes patrouillant les couloirs du complexe s'avéra des plus funestes, la créature ne laissant d'eux qu'une pulpe de sang, chair et os broyés. Elle avait traîné l'un des pauvres hères pour s'en repaître plus tard, et en suivant cette trace sanglante, les autres soldats parvinrent à localiser son antre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El destino de los guardias que patrullaban los pasillos del complejo resultó ser funesto: la criatura no dejó más que masas de sangre, carne y huesos partidos. Se llevó a uno de ellos y, siguiendo el rastro de sangre, los otros soldados consiguieron localizar su guarida.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex's corridors proved grim indeed: the creature left them little more than a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away and, by following the blood trail, the other soldiers were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El destino de los guardias que patrullaban los pasillos del complejo resultó ser funesto: la criatura no dejó más que masas de sangre, carne y huesos partidos. Se llevó a uno de ellos y, siguiendo el rastro de sangre, los otros soldados consiguieron localizar su guarida.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kompleksin koridorlarında devriye gezen muhafızların kaderi gerçekten acımasız oldu. Yaratık; onlardan geriye kan, et ve parçalanmış kemik yığınından başka pek bir şey bırakmadı. Muhafızlardan birini sürükleyip götürdü. Kan izini takip eden diğer askerler onu inine kadar izleyebildi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex's corridors proved grim indeed: the creature left them little more than a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away and, by following the blood trail, the other soldiers were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kompleksin koridorlarında devriye gezen muhafızların kaderi gerçekten acımasız oldu. Yaratık; onlardan geriye kan, et ve parçalanmış kemik yığınından başka pek bir şey bırakmadı. Muhafızlardan birini sürükleyip götürdü. Kan izini takip eden diğer askerler onu inine kadar izleyebildi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在设施走廊中巡逻的守卫命运确实极为悲惨：那只生物将他们撕成了血肉模糊的残渣。它将一名守卫拖走，其他士兵则循着血迹追踪到了它的巢穴。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The fate of the guards patrolling the complex's corridors proved grim indeed: the creature left them little more than a pulp of blood, flesh, and splintered bone. It dragged one of the guards away and, by following the blood trail, the other soldiers were able to trace it back to its lair.{/n}
